chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-511 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 26.12.2024 Mr. Aijaz Ali Advocate for Petitioners along with Petitioners. Ms. Sana Memon, Assistant Prosecutor General along with PI Muhammad Changal on behalf of SSP Hyderabad and ASI Muhammad Arshad PS A-Section Nawabshah. ----- Petitioners are present in person. Their Counsel submits that on account of their freewill marriage their relatives are causing harassment to them. Police officials present, who have submitted comments, undertake that due protection would be provided to the petitioners. Counsel for the petitioners is satisfied and this Petition is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
